  1. Defeat 3 Renegade DMAT-90 lvl 30.

Quest Text

Description

We have located a new type of fighter in Kritillian. It has a very strong armor and uses a new type of laser weapon. Kill 3 of them and see what you can find out about their weapon.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
